name: @aefree/pi-codecks

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: npx --yes tsx tests/vision-board-tool.test.ts && npx --yes tsx tests/card-reference-normalization.test.ts && npx --yes tsx tests/done-timeframe-validation.test.ts && npx --yes tsx tests/card-get-tool.test.ts && npx --yes tsx tests/resolvable-tool-registration.test.ts && npx --yes tsx tests/tool-rendering.test.ts

description: Pi tools, skills, and prompts for Codecks workflows.
